text: A non return of breast cancer night sweats polyps in the womb brought about the menopause weight gain I had a mastectomy and radio therapy followed by 6 months of chemotherapy and then tamoxifen. Weight gain and ceasing mensturation may have been caused byt he combined effects of the chemotherapyt and tamoxifen. Given I had 3 polyps removed it was decided to cease tamoxifen in the 5th year.
